name: Bacon-Onion Croutons
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the crusts from 5 slices of firm white bread or 6 slices of French bread.
2. Dice the bread into 1/2-inch cubes.
3. In a large frying pan over medium heat, heat 2 tablespoons of bacon drippings with onion powder and poppy seeds.
4. Add the bread cubes to the pan, stirring well until they are coated with the mixture.
5. Transfer the bread cubes to a rimmed baking sheet and spread them in a single layer.
6. Bake at 300°F for 25-30 minutes, or until lightly browned and crisp.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool.
Makes about two cups.
